articles.description: Jose Mourinho is in final negotiations to become Real Madrid's next head coach, 13 years after his first spell at the Bernabeu.
articles.title: Real Madrid: Jose Mourinho in final negotiations to become next head coach

articles.description: With two games remaining of the Premier League season, Tottenham and West Ham are the two horses left in the race to avoid relegation.
articles.title: Premier League relegation battle: Will it be Tottenham or West Ham who survive?

articles.description: Former Georgia captain Merab Sharikadze is banned for 11 years for violating anti-doping rules, with five team-mates handed suspensions of up to six years.
articles.title: Merab Sharikadze: Ex Georgia captain banned for 11 years for cheating anti-doping rules

articles.description: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick agrees a contract extension after leading the Spanish giants to a 29th La Liga title.
articles.title: Barcelona: Coach Hansi Flick agrees one-year contract extension to 2028

articles.description: NBA legend LeBron James could have played his last game for the Los Angeles Lakers after their defeat by the Oklahoma City Thunder in the play-offs.
articles.title: LA Lakers 110-115 Oklahoma City Thunder: LeBron James future unclear after play-off defeat

articles.description: Jake Paul says his boxing career is "most definitely" in doubt as he awaits scan results on injuries sustained during his loss to British heavyweight Anthony Joshua.
articles.title: Jake Paul says boxing career is in doubt over injuries from Anthony Joshua fight

articles.description: Southampton request more time to conduct an internal review after being charged with spying on Championship play-off rivals Middlesbrough.
articles.title: Southampton begin internal review over spying claims

articles.description: BBC Sport F1 correspondent Andrew Benson answers your latest questions.
articles.title: F1 Q&A: Engine rules, Alpine improvement, wet-weather racing and fitting in extra races

articles.description: Bangladesh fast bowler Nahid Rana claims 5-40 to help the Tigers beat Pakistan in a Test at home for the first time.
articles.title: Bangladesh vs Pakistan: Tigers seal first Test win in Mirpur with 104-run victory

articles.description: Romania's Sorana Cirstea is playing some of the finest tennis in her 20-year career - will she be tempted to reverse her decision to retire at the end of 2026?
articles.title: Italian Open 2026: Sorana Cirstea reaches Rome semi-finals in her final season before retirement
